title: citrus obversa
intro: Citrus obversa, also known as the Sudachi citrus, is a type of small, green citrus fruit native to Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Citrus obversa include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and provide antioxidant properties that protect against cell damage. Citrus obversa can be consumed as a juice, used in teas, or made into supplements and herbal preparations, such as essential oils and extracts.
